name: logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month, delays in shipment tracking cause operational inefficiencies. We reconcile shipment tracking data with purchase orders instead of manual tracking and reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: delays in shipment tracking lead to operational inefficiencies
features: manual entry of shipment and order data

must_have_features: manual entry of shipment and order data
